title: Define HPOM system scope
description: Define what HPOM means in this project and how it should relate to MAP, HCOM, command-center helpers, local assistants, task ownership, and durable memory. Command-center requested starting HPOM implementation on 2026-06-29.
acceptance_criteria: shared/hpom.md defines the HPOM acronym, boundary, inputs, outputs, and relationship to MAP/HCOM/local assistants
shared/agent-capability-matrix.md lists what each current worker/model/tool is good at and what to avoid
The HPOM plan states whether HPOM is a protocol, operating model, orchestration layer, or command-center workflow
The HPOM plan lists what HPOM must not do, especially around hidden helper work, final authority, and task ownership
A command-center decision is recorded in shared/decisions.md and current-state/architecture link to the HPOM references
